chinese_news.title: 2026VENTURE50重磅来袭，多维度甄选高成长创新企业
chinese_news.summary:
2026年全球科技产业正经历结构性重构。具身智能从实验室走向工厂产线，大模型技术重塑千行万业的运营逻辑，商业航天、低空经济、量子信息等新赛道加速成型。与此同时，国内创投生态持续进化，耐心资本加速集聚，国资平台与市场化基金协同发力，产业端与资本端正在共同锚定硬核创新企业培育赛道。在这一背景下，发掘真正具备技术壁垒和成熟商业化能力的优质创新企业，已成为资本与产业界共同关注的核心命题。

2006年，清科控股（01945.HK）发起“VENTURE50投资价值企业”评选时，中国创投市场尚处萌芽阶段。二十年后，这份创新企业评选亲历了从模式

chinese_news.title: 长鑫科技更新招股书，碧桂园错失300亿
chinese_news.summary:
地产行业内，曾有望跑出两家明星创投企业，一家是世纪金源，另一家是碧桂园。前者现在做得顺风顺水，收获一个又一个IPO，而碧桂园因为地产业务暴雷，需要大量资金保交楼，被迫中断了在科技领域的投资“大爆发”。

01

5月17日，计划登陆科创板的长鑫科技集团股份有限公司（以下简称：长鑫科技）更新了招股书。新招股书的财务数据显示，2026年第一季度，长鑫科技营收508亿元，同比增长719.13%；归母净利润247.62亿元，同比大增1688%，完成创历史的盈亏翻盘（2025年累计亏损366.5亿元）。

可以预计，随着营收和利润的大幅增长，长鑫科技的估值将会再创新高。上市前，长鑫科技的估值已逼近3000亿元。但若按2026年一季度的财务表现，结合同类已上市企业的市盈率计算，部分机构给到长鑫科技的最新估值高达2万亿左右。

长鑫科技是中国大陆规模最大的DRAM研发设计制造一体化（IDM）企业。DRAM芯片是电脑、手机、服务器内存条的核心部件。今年，存储产业

chinese_news.title: 理想新L9上市72小时：老车主复购占大头，仍需从“家庭”破圈
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 徐蔡钰 编辑 | 李勤

“爆了，试驾根本约不上”，5月16至17日，理想新L9上市的首个周末，门店挤满了前来试驾的用户们。

这款在2022年首次面世的增程大六座SUV，发布了第四代车型。新L9分Ultra与Livis两种版本，起售价分别为45.98万元、50.98万元。

相较此前的年度改款，本次新L9的更新幅度更加显著：

全系标配72.7kWh电池，纯电续航达到420公里，综合续航突破1600公里。理想自研马赫芯片首次上车，单颗芯片算力达到1280TOPS。线控转向系统与后轮转向技术的加入，带来了底盘能力的大幅升级；Livis版本额外搭载的800V主动悬架与EMB电子机械制动系统，更是汽车底盘前沿技术的首发落地。

配置拉满的同时，将实际售价较预售价大幅下调5万元，新L9一套“高配降价”的组合拳，力度超出了市场预期。

新车上市后，理想全国门店似乎复现了2022年第一代L9上市的火爆盛况

chinese_news.title: 做出百万台割草机器人后，未岚大陆CEO决定让自己变得“不重要”｜硬氪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

未岚大陆CEO任冠佼等了7年，等到了行业的爆发。

他还记得，2019年刚进入无边界智能割草机器人赛道，自己“只是觉得这个方向一定能火”。到2021年第一代产品推出时，他们也只敢确定，这是一个能做到10-20亿的行业。

直到2025年，增速超出他的预期。IDC数据显示，2025年全球无边界割草机器人出货量达到131.8万台，同比增长182.4%，占整个割草机器人市场出货量的66.2%。未岚大陆自身的累计实现量产，在今年突破100万台，公司营收迈入数十亿量级。

但同时，高速增长的背后，也倒逼任冠佼完成了一场至关重要的认知破局。

任冠佼意识到，行业迭代速度持续加快，以往相对保守的经营方式显然已经跟不上节奏。

他逼着自己从一个工程师成长为公司掌舵人。最近一年，任冠佼跳出琐碎的一线工作、学习战略研判，并慢慢适应创业者最难的一课——学会放手。

他不再事事亲力

chinese_news.title: 要做数字劳动力生产工厂，「未来式智能」完成Pre-A轮融资
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜邓咏仪

36氪获悉，未来式智能（AutoAgents.ai）近日完成Pre-A轮融资，新进投资方包括凡创资本、中关村资本、探元资本，老股东东证创新、麟阁创投跟投，本轮融资主要用于算力投入、团队扩张以及新产品的生态建设运营。

未来式智能成立于2023年6月，专注于以智能体技术赋能知识工作者。核心团队来自达摩院、腾讯、字节跳动和谷歌。创始人兼CEO杨劲松曾在达摩院担任产品/商业化总监，曾任字节飞书AI负责人、亚马逊AWS aPaaS平台负责人，主导推出阿里灵杰、通义-Alicemind，在AI产品和商业化方面有着多年经验。

作为核心产品之一的企业级智能体搭建平台“灵搭”，旨在解决企业部署和应用大模型时的核心诉求：数据安全隐私、权限分级管理、复杂系统集成，以及智能体在真实业务场景中的交付稳定性。

“灵搭”从诞生之初便一直把重点放在企业客户，尤其是电力、金融、制造等对稳定性和合规要求极高的行业。

chinese_news.title: 早期项目 | Chance AI获美图等数百万美元投资，用户数已达20万
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，Visual Agent（视觉智能体）创业公司Chance AI宣布完成数百万美元天使轮融资。本轮由美图领投，NYX Ventures、阿里系投资机构等跟投。融资将用于模型能力迭代、北美学生群体增长、以及社区与商业化探索。

Chance AI成立于2025年，核心产品是全球第一款以摄像头为主要交互入口的AI产品——Visual Agent（视觉智能体）。

与传统AI产品依赖输入框不同，用户打开Chance AI后直接拍摄眼前内容，系统即可理解视觉���图并提供判断、建议和行动方案。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型；DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑；全国存款十强城市出炉
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型
  • 洁丽雅回应豪门内斗传闻，“毛巾少爷”1个月带货超500万元
  • 巨力索具连续第二日跌停
  • 前三星芯片负责人：明年内存将降价
  • 自费流感疫苗也可使用医保报销
  • 谷歌搜索宣布大改版，AI模式与代理助手全面嵌入

TOP 3 大新闻

DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑

5月19日，DeepSeek发布关于< think >字符触发模型异常回复的说明。近期关注到有用户反馈，在与DeepSeek模型的对话中输入< think >这类特殊字符后，模型偶发返回不可预期的内容，使部分用户产生了“对话泄露”的疑虑。针对这一问题，技术团队经全面排查后发现：输入< think >等字符触发返回异常内容，属于特殊字符引发的模型幻觉，不涉及安全问题或隐私泄露。

chinese_news.title: 当“躺平”、Gap被歧视，我们该如何度过奥德赛时期？ | 职场极端气候 ②
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思 U Sense」）

2026年2月，小红书博主橘一橙NiceFriend发布了一条视频。她在视频里把奥德赛时期定义为“对事业、情感以及身份认同产生强烈焦虑和迷茫的阶段”，将之概括为“成年人类的未成年”。这条视频获得10万+点赞，8.6万收藏。

“奥德赛时期”这个词并非中文原生。2007年，《纽约时报》专栏作家大卫·布鲁克斯发表了同名评论文章，借用荷马史诗中奥德修斯战后漂泊十年才返回家乡的

market_questions_to_create.question: Will China's Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline deal with Russia be formally signed by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official announcements from Russian Gazprom, Chinese CNPC, or Reuters/Bloomberg energy reporters

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda'; concurrent Iran war rattling energy markets

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'Meta begins 8K global job cuts, starting in Singapore'; broader context of AI model efficiency (Gemini 3.5, DeepSeek) enabling leaner ops

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the DXY (U.S. Dollar Index) close above 107 on September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: ICE Futures U.S. DXY contract settlement price or Federal Reserve H.10 index
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Treasury yield surge + sticky U.S. inflation spillover fears lock in higher for longer U.S. rates; EU trade deal negotiation signals weaker negotiating position from other blocs; emerging market energy shock (Iran war, Russia gas pipeline delays) drives EM FX outflows into USD; gold/commodity weakness not yet reflected in DXY consensus.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'U.S. Treasurys are now firmly in the danger zone...sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities'; CNBC: 'Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets'; EU trade pact signals asymmetric USD strength

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY via DXY perpetual futures; short emerging market FX (e.g., CNY, INR, BRL) as Iran war geopolitical premium + sticky U.S. inflation lock in higher USD rates.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'U.S. Treasurys are in a danger zone as surging long-term yields raise fears that sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities'
CNBC: 'Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets' — EM energy exposure + geopolitical risk premium to USD
CoinDesk: 'Non-dollar stablecoins are struggling to crack 0.5% of market share' — indicates flight to USD-denominated assets
investment_theses.counter_view: Senate curbs on Trump's Iran war powers (CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin, ether, XRP rebound as Senate curbs Trump's Iran war powers') could de-escalate geopolitical premium quickly; EU trade deal signals willingness to negotiate rather than escalate, capping DXY upside.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY perpetual futures (e.g., via Bybit or Binance) with 2x leverage; paired with short CNY/USD (USDCNY forward contracts) or short BRL/USD if accessible; alternatively, long SPY alongside short commodity-heavy indices (EEM, IEMG)

investment_theses.thesis: Short equity volatility (VIX) as implied volatility remains low despite bond yield spike — market is mis-pricing tail risk; rotation into defensive/duration trades limits downside.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin is falling, bond yields are rising. Yet BTC's implied volatility, an uncertainty gauge, remains low' — suggests broader vol compression despite macro stress
K33 via CoinDesk: 'This bitcoin bear market is different with uniquely pessimistic traders limiting downside' — retail/positioning already capitulated, reducing crash risk
CNBC: 'Stocks under pressure as correction fears grow...The pendulum could swing backwards' — warnings issued but positioning suggests contrarian bounce setup
investment_theses.counter_view: Treasury strategists explicitly cite 'danger zone' and inflation spillover fears; equity correction could accelerate if yields break above 4.5% in next 2-4 weeks, spiking VIX sharply higher and triggering stop-loss cascade.
investment_theses.expression: Short VIX via VIX call spreads (sell 20/25 call spread, ~45 DTE) or via inverse ETFs like SVXY with 1-2x leverage; alternatively, short vol via BTC options (sell strangles on 30-delta strikes) as BTC realized volatility likely trails implied

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductors (NVDA, MU, AMD) on AI capex acceleration signaled by Gemini 3.5, Google search integration, and domestic Chinese embodied AI boom; Treasury yield spike creates valuation entry after tech selloff.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: 'Gemini 3.5 Flash' (756 score, dominant AI discussion) indicates market attention shifting to inference optimization (lower margin, higher volume than training); Google's SynthID watermarking + search integration signals AI inference at scale

36Kr flagging embodied AI ('具身智能从实验室走向工厂产线') and multiple agent AI startups (未来式智能 Pre-A, Chance AI angel funding from Meitu) — Chinese market accelerating AI agent deployment, implying global semiconductor capacity build
Bitwise callout of HYPE (Hyperliquid) as 'most mispriced' asset, and broader crypto rebound on Senate vote — suggests risk-on sentiment re-entering if geopolitical fears fade
investment_theses.counter_view: CNBC correction fears and Treasury yield spike could trigger multi-quarter pullback in high-multiple semiconductor stocks (NVDA trades at elevated P/E); AI model efficiency (Gemini 3.5, DeepSeek) may compress GPU/training demand more than consensus expects, extending margin pressure.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA or SMH (semiconductor ETF) with 30-50% of capital; pair with long-dated call spreads (Jan 2027 100/120 spreads) to cap downside while preserving upside on AI capex surprise; avoid margin, size for 4-6 week hold minimum

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC as 'pristine collateral' hedge against U.S. stablecoin liquidity crisis (Tether/Circle forced asset sales into rising yields); Senate Iran vote reduces war premium but low IV + pessimistic retail positioning supports floor.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Even a mountain of T-bills won't save Tether and Circle from a sudden liquidity crisis, expert says' — if Treasury yields stay elevated, stablecoin spreads widen, creating BTC demand as non-custodial alternative

CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin is falling, bond yields are rising. Yet BTC's implied volatility, an uncertainty gauge, remains low' — underpriced tail risk or complacency; either way, asymmetric reward if liquidity crisis triggers
Trump order to review fintech Fed access (Cointelegraph) — regulatory uncertainty creates demand for non-custodial BTC as hedge
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC selloff into $60k-$63k zone could accelerate if equity correction deepens and margin calls force crypto liquidations; stablecoin crisis may take 6+ months to materialize (not 45 days), pushing capital allocation timeline beyond current signal window.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC via spot holdings (HODL in cold storage) or 1x leverage perpetual longs (Bybit, Deribit); avoid high leverage; alternatively, long BTC/USD perpetuals with 20-30% capital, tight stops at $62k if macro deteriorates, targeting $68k-$72k on stabilization

investment_theses.thesis: Rotate SPY underweight → China-exposed / commodity plays (CRB index, energy stocks) as Putin-Xi energy deal + EM FX weakness create arbitrage window; Trump tariff threat via EU deal signals more measured approach, reducing recession risk.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'EU clears major hurdle to finalize U.S. trade pact — and sidestep Trump tariff hikes' — suggests Trump willing to negotiate, reducing 'trade war recession' tail risk that was suppressing cyclicals
CNBC: 'Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline...' — China energy deal signals infrastructure investment cycle, supports materials/commodity cycle into 2026-Q3
36Kr reports on Chinese AI agents and embodied robotics ('未岚大陆' 割草机器人 scaling, robotic automation) — domestic demand cycle accelerating in China, supports CNY post-yuan weakness entry
investment_theses.counter_view: SPY correction (CNBC: 'correction fears grow') could pull all risk assets lower; geopolitical escalation on Iran or Russia-Ukraine could reverse EU trade optimism quickly; commodity supercycle narrative priced into CRB already, limiting alpha upside.
investment_theses.expression: Trim SPY 5-10% of portfolio; rotate into IYM (Ilyxx Materials ETF) or XLE (energy) with 3-6 month hold; alternatively, long commodity index CRB via futures or UBC iPath B Bloomberg Commodity ETN; pair with long CNY/USD for currency diversification if accessible via currency forwards
